category_sources: source_facts.description says Build tooling for Clojure; official site headline says Build tooling for Clojure.
display_name_sources: Official boot-clj site and README title use Boot; source_facts.name is boot-clj to distinguish the package.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Boot site; official README links GitHub wiki as documentation and README for getting started.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated as https://github.com/boot-clj/boot, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official site identify Clojure build tooling; README describes build framework and script evaluator features.
